title: Geraniospermum crispum
taxonomy: Geraniospermum crispum is a member of the family Menispermaceae. It belongs to the order Ranunculales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places Geraniospermum crispum within the kingdom Plantae. Its taxonomic classification is also often associated with the subclass Magnoliidae.
